name: KrillApp.DataPoint
title: Data Points
description: Represents a single measurable value that stores time-series data. When invoked by an observed source (a node listed in its meta.sources completing its work), it pulls the snapshot of its first input that is a data-source type, validates the value against the filter nodes listed in its meta.inputs, stores the validated snapshot in the data store and in its own meta.snapshot, and then every node observing this DataPoint as a source is invoked. To store node X's output, X must appear in BOTH the DataPoint's sources and inputs. Supports configurable data types (text, JSON, digital, double), precision, units, and manual entry.
shortDescription: Stores time-series snapshot values; nodes observing it are invoked on each update.
llmPurpose: Stores time-series snapshot data ingested from a data-source node wired into its sources and inputs, and propagates updates to the triggers, executors, and graphs that observe it.
llmBehavior: invoked when an observed source (meta.sources) completes its work (SOURCE_INVOKED)
pulls the snapshot of its first input that is a data-source type
validates the value against filter nodes listed in meta.inputs
stores validated snapshots in the persistent data store and in its own meta.snapshot
on each stored update, nodes observing this DataPoint as a source are invoked
llmInputs: snapshot value pulled from the first data-source-type node in meta.inputs
configuration: data type, precision, unit, maxAge
llmOutputs: invocation of nodes that observe this DataPoint as a source
llmTypicalUseCases: feed data to triggers and calculations
llmPromptHints: create a data point for this sensor
llmCreationHints: Create a DataPoint when the user needs to store and track a measurable value over time. Configure data type, precision, and unit. To ingest another node's output, list that node in BOTH the DataPoint's sources (with SOURCE_INVOKED in invocationTriggers) and its inputs. List any filter nodes in inputs as well — a filter merely parented under the DataPoint does nothing.

llmConnectionHints.role: central data node observed by triggers, graphs, and executors; ingests from the data-source node wired into its sources and inputs
llmConnectionHints.wiring: List the node whose output to store (e.g. a Pin, SerialDevice, webhook, or calculation) in BOTH sources (with SOURCE_INVOKED) and inputs; list filters in inputs; downstream triggers and executors observe this DataPoint via their own sources.

llmExamples: Create a data point to store temperature readings.
Add a data point for this serial sensor with 2 decimal precision.
Track humidity values over time with a unit of '%'.
Set up a data point that I can manually enter values into.
